Per the changelog at http://www.sudo.ws/sudo/stable.html: "The HOME and 
MAIL environment variables are now reset based on the target user's 
password database entry when the env_reset sudoers option is enabled 
(which is the case in the default configuration). Users wishing to 
preserve the original values should use a sudoers entry like:
